drawer.tapMapAdjust: Tap map or drag pin to adjust location
drawer.tempPassword: Use temporary password received via WhatsApp in 'Current password' field.

photo.dragCorners: Drag the 4 colored corners · Use slider to rotate

guide.title: JET OS Guide
guide.subtitle: {n} topics available for {role}
guide.footerDesc: Questions? Talk to your operation manager. This guide is personalized for your access as

passos.desc: Drag to move, pinch to zoom. Tap a station to see details.
Use TYPE (Pub/Priv/Comp) and STATUS buttons to filter stations.
Tap 🛰 in the side FABs to enable satellite view.
Tap 🛴 to see GoJet scooters and parkings in real time.
passos.dica: Available for managers and admins only.

passos.desc: Tap the + FAB and then tap the map to place the pin.
Name, address, type (Public/Private/Competitor), status and field consultant.
Use Camera, Gallery or paste a URL. Photos are saved to Firebase Storage.
Tap Add station. City is detected automatically from GPS.
In the station popup, tap Sketch to open the editor.
Drag the 4 colored corners to mark the station area.
Use the rotation slider to align correctly.
Tap Save with measurements. Dimensions are calculated automatically.
passos.dica: The sketch appears in the station PDF report.

passos.desc: Tap the 🛡 FAB (purple). Available for guard, field, manager and security manager.
Select type, fill in asset ID (e.g. S.315761), shift and location.
For Robbery/Attempt, fill in suspect description for real-time alerts.
Add up to 2 photos and the police report number.
In the panel, use the search field to find incidents by asset ID.
passos.dica: Filter works in real time.

passos.desc: Tap Guard in the map header to open the side panel.
Filter by Robbery, Vandalism, Attempt, etc.
Use the search field to find incidents for a specific scooter.
Tap the incident then Edit/Resolve to update status or add notes.

A slot is a work shift assigned to one or more agents. It groups tasks (points to visit), defines schedule, zone and type: Charger (battery swap) or Scout (redistribute scooters). The agent accepts, checks in with a photo and executes each task.
passos.dica: Every slot has an acceptance SLA. If no one accepts in time, the system escalates via Telegram.

passos.desc: Go to 📦 Slots → ➕ Create tab. Choose type (Scout or Charger), fill in title, shift times, zone, SLA and (optionally) assign a worker. Add tasks with destination, quantity and priority. Click ✓ Create Slot.
passos.dica: Leaving the Worker field empty keeps the slot open for any agent in the city to accept.

passos.desc: In 📦 Slots → 🤖 Auto-slots tab, create a config per zone. Set quantity thresholds (min, target, max) and battery threshold. The engine runs every 15 min via Cloud Function and creates slots automatically.
passos.dica: Empty points generate urgent slots. Excess scooters generate redistribution scouts.

passos.desc: In the zone config, ⏰ Windows tab: define time windows with their own parameters — e.g. morning peak 07h-09h with target 12, night 22h-00h with reduced target. The active window overrides global values.
passos.dica: Cross-midnight windows are supported. The one with the highest numeric priority wins overlaps.

passos.desc: In the Workers per slot field of the zone config, set N. The engine finds the N nearest available agents and distributes tasks round-robin: task 1→A, task 2→B, task 3→A…
passos.dica: Use 2+ workers in large zones or when many critical points appear simultaneously.

passos.desc: Enable Include off-point scooters in the config. The engine detects scooters without a parking_id and generates 📍 Return to [Point X] tasks, grouping scooters within a 0.5 km radius.
In the 📋 Slots tab, each card shows status, worker, progress and SLA. Click to expand and see all tasks. Flashing orange card = acceptance SLA expiring soon.
passos.dica: Use the status filter at the top (Open / In progress / Done) to focus on active slots.

passos.desc: In the expanded card, click ✏ Reassign to change the worker without losing history. To cancel, click ✕ Cancel and state the reason — the worker gets push + Telegram automatically.
passos.dica: Cancelled slots cannot be reopened. Create a new one if needed.

passos.desc: In 📦 Slots → 👥 Team tab, see all workers in the city with their current status (free, in slot, offline). Click to view history and completion rate.
The engine sorts scooters from most critical (lowest battery) to least. Bikes below 10% get urgent priority. Tasks are grouped by GoJet point.
passos.dica: Battery threshold is configurable per zone and per time window. Default: 40%.

passos.desc: Empty → urgent, refill full target. Low (<50%) → high, fill the gap. Excess (>120%) → normal, redistribute surplus. All types go in ONE slot, ordered by urgency.
If a slot stays unaccepted past the SLA, the Cloud Function escalates: Telegram to the managers group, increased priority and a new dispatch to the next available workers.
passos.dica: Configure the acceptance SLA per zone. Manual slots also have an SLA field at creation.

passos.desc: With 👥 Field active, see agents on the map. Green = GPS < 90s. Yellow = 90s-5min. Red = >5min. Click a pin to fly to their position.
passos.dica: In the task detail view, the mini-map shows the agent's distance to the destination in real time.

passos.desc: In 📦 Slots → 📂 History tab, filter by period, type, zone and status. Click ⬇ CSV to export with UTF-8 BOM — opens directly in Excel without encoding issues.
Work shifts for logistics agents with defined schedule, zone and role.
In the Slots tab, see available slots and tap Accept.
At shift time, tap Check-in. GPS activates automatically.
passos.dica: Allow location all the time for background GPS.

passos.desc: In the Tasks tab, see priority-ordered points. Tap to see address and navigate.
Start task > go to point > take photo > Mark as done.
When done, tap Check-out to stop GPS.
Tap the 🛴 button in FABs.

passos.dica: Points with target = circle. Without target = grey square.

passos.desc: 🟢 Available · 🟡 In rental · ⚫ Reserved · 🔴 Maintenance · 🟣 Workshop (not counted) · 🟠 Low battery
Tap 📊 bottom-left: empty points, below target, bikes by status.
🟢 Data < 3min · 🟡 3–8min · 🔴 > 8min ago.
All · 🔴 Empty · 🟠 < target · 🔵 On target · 🟢 Excess · 🔗 M1/M2/M3
passos.dica: 🔗 filter shows GoJet points with JET OS station within 150m.

passos.desc: ⚠️ Out of point · 🟠 Low battery · 🟢 Available.
Tap 👥 Field to see online operators. Tap name to fly to their position.
Chrome > menu > Add to home screen.
Safari > Share > Add to Home Screen.
Grant location access all the time for background GPS.
passos.dica: Disable battery optimization for the app in Settings > Apps.

passos.desc: App updates automatically. Close and reopen if changes don't appear.
Tap the 🔍 FAB then 📍 to load points from OpenStreetMap.
Tap 🎯 to open the candidate points panel.
passos.dica: Adjust Gap Radius, Area Radius and Min Score to calibrate suggestions.

passos.desc: Charging Bases, Service Centers, Warehouses and Redistribution Points — where scooters are charged, repaired or stored.
Tap the 🏭 FAB. Pins appear with icon by type.
passos.dica: Tap any pin to edit the location.

passos.desc: With 🏭 active, tap 📍 and tap the map. The form opens with name, type, photo, capacity and responsible.
Tap 💳 to open the financial panel. Select a location and month to see payments.
passos.dica: For energy, previous + current reading calculates the value automatically.

passos.desc: Tap the ⬡ FAB then 'New zone'. Tap the map to add vertices.
Tap '📂 KMZ' to import zones from a Google My Maps file. Stations are ignored — only polygons are imported.
Select a zone and tap 'Edit vertices' to drag the points.
Set name, group, phase, color and priority.
Cloud Functions monitor field operators' GPS and send automatic alerts via Telegram.
If an operator doesn't arrive at the point within 20 minutes of starting the task, Telegram notifies the manager with the current distance.
If a task runs for more than 30 minutes without completing, an alert is sent with progress (e.g. 3/5 delivered).
If an operator with an active task goes more than 10 minutes without sending GPS, Telegram alerts to check the app.
passos.dica: Configure in Settings → Apps → JET OS → Battery → No restriction.

passos.desc: Alerts have a 30-minute cooldown to prevent spam. The same operator/task won't trigger repeated alerts before that.
Tap the 🛡 FAB. Fill in type, description, location and photos. Telegram receives automatic notifications for Robbery, Vandalism and Attempt. Recovery also notifies Telegram.
Vandalism, Robbery, Attempt, Recovery, Other. Robberies appear in the Robberies Panel. Vandalism has extra damage assessment fields (%, R$).
When editing a Vandalism incident, fill in '% Damage' (0–100) and 'Value R$' after workshop assessment. These appear in Guard Dashboard and Report.
Each saved change (status, type, asset, report, searching) is recorded in the incident history with user name, changed field and timestamp. Visible in the edit modal.
In the Guard mobile screen, the 🔍 Wanted tab lists all assets marked as wanted. Search by asset ID, city or type.
In the Guard map panel, city chips appear above the list. Tap to filter incidents from the desired city.
The '📊 Guard Dash' button in the header shows Robberies, Vandalism, R$ damage, BRPD losses, recovery rate and weekly trend.
Open incidents show a '🔓 2h30m' badge indicating how long they've been open. Yellow < 6h, orange > 6h, red > 1 day.
'Send Report' in Guard Dashboard sends to Telegram: PT-BR + RU message and 4-page PDF. P1: Robberies PT. P2: Robberies RU. P3: Vandalism. P4: Losses and full appendix.
The 'gestor_seg' role accesses Guard, Guard Analytics, Guard Dashboard and Robberies Panel. Can approve contractor records. No access to stations or slots.
Tap 🔴 Robberies in the map FABs. Available for manager, gestor_seg and admin. Red pins appear on the map when Guard opens.
Total robberies, recovered, recovery rate, open wanted. Filters: 7d / 30d / 90d / all. Search by asset ID, city or description.
Sent at 7am Tuesday–Sunday to the Telegram group. Reports the previous day. On Monday it sends the weekly report (Sun → Sat of the previous week).
'Send Report' button in Guard Dashboard. Immediately generates and sends the 4-page executive PDF plus PT-BR + RU message.

P1 PT: Open robberies (no recovered), KPIs, city table, 24h details. P2 RU: same info in Russian. P3: Vandalism with R$ and % damage. P4: BRPD losses, general KPIs and full appendix with clickable photos.
Yesterday shows the real date (e.g. 09/06). Current month shows the range (e.g. 01/06 to 09/06). Accumulated shows the year range of data (e.g. 2023–2026).
Click '🚚 Logistics' in the header.
Admin: dropdown at top. Manager: sees only their city (cidadesGerenciaLog).
passos.dica: Edit Firestore document: cidadesGerenciaLog (array).

passos.desc: Live KPIs: operators online, pending tasks, today slots. Weather alert via Open-Meteo.
Scheduled CLT vs clock-in today. ✅ Came / ❌ Absent / 😴 Day off / ⏳ Waiting.
Live GPS with 8h history for anti-fraud. Distances detect GPS spoofing.
Batch creation. Weather forecast warns about rain before Scout slots.
passos.dica: Auto-confirmation: reminder 120min, re-check 90min, reopen 60min without response.

passos.desc: Filter by type. Reassignment with distance per operator. XLSX and PDF export.
Temporary suspension with countdown. Alert for expiries within 3 days.
Direct send by city/group. Role templates. Mass slot confirmation.
passos.dica: Configure Chat ID in Config → Telegram.

passos.desc: Click 📊 next to 🛴 button. Available for manager and admin.
Distribution bars by status, scooter stats, online workers and full color legend.
Table: status, available, physical, target, occupation %, M1/M2/M3 badge.
passos.dica: Sort by Status (critical first), Name A-Z or Quantity.

passos.desc: 🔴 Empty · 🟠 <50% · 🟡 50–85% · 🔵 On target · 🟢 Excess. Search by name.
Clickable KPIs. ID, visual battery, at point or out, sub-status.
GPS: 🟢<5min / 🟡<15min / 🟠<30min. Exact time. Google Maps link.
